TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Manager.title: Token Defaults — Presets
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Manager.empty: No presets yet. Click "New Preset" to create one.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Manager.applyDefaults: Apply Foundry defaults to this preset
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Manager.applyDefaultsConf: Overwrite the field values of preset "{name}" with the Foundry defaults? Existing values for this preset will be lost.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Menu.presetManager.name: Token Default Presets
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Menu.presetManager.label: Manage Presets
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Menu.presetManager.hint: Create and edit token presets to apply when actors are placed on a scene.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Picker.title: Token Preset
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Picker.promptNew: Choose a token preset to apply when this actor is placed on a scene.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Picker.promptExisting: Choose a token preset for "{name}". Future placements will use the selected preset.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Picker.promptFolder: Choose a token preset to apply to {count} actor(s) in "{name}".
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Picker.promptSelection: Choose a token preset to apply to {count} selected token(s).
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Picker.label: Preset
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Picker.noPresets: No token presets configured. Open Module Settings → Manage Presets to create one.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Context.setFolderPreset: Set Token Preset for All Actors…
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Push.confirmActor: Apply preset "{preset}" to {count} placed token(s) of "{actor}"?
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Push.confirmFolder: Apply tagged presets to {count} placed token(s) across folder "{folder}"? ({summary})
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Push.note: This overwrites the listed fields on existing token placements. Previous values are saved per-token so a future undo can restore them.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Push.noFlag: This actor has no preset assigned. Use "Set Token Preset…" first.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Push.presetMissing: The actor's assigned preset no longer exists.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Push.noPlacements: No placed tokens reference this actor.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Push.folderNoFlags: No actors in this folder have a preset assigned.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Push.noSelection: Select one or more tokens on the canvas first.
TOKEN_DEFAULTS.Folder.note: This affects future token placements only. Tokens already placed on scenes are not changed.
